ddls:
CREATE TABLE "charges" (
  "charge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charge */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the charge was created */,
  "modification_date" TEXT /* Date the charge was last modified */,
  "closure_date" TEXT /* Date the charge was closed */,
  "assets_under_charge_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assets under charge */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the charge */,
  "charge_holder_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the charge holder */,
  "charge_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of charge */,
  "charge_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status of the charge */,
  "additional_details" TEXT /* Additional details or comments about the charge */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the charge */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last modified the charge */,
  "closed_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who closed the charge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("charge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charges_charge_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("charge_status_id") REFERENCES charge_status ("charge_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charges_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charges_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charges_charge_holder_id FOREIGN KEY ("charge_holder_id") REFERENCES charge_holders ("charge_holder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charges_charge_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("charge_type_id") REFERENCES charge_types ("charge_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charges_closed_by FOREIGN KEY ("closed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charges_assets_under_charge_id FOREIGN KEY ("assets_under_charge_id") REFERENCES assets_under_charge ("assets_under_charge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets_under_charge" (
  "assets_under_charge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset under charge */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of asset (e.g., movable, immovable) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset */,
  "asset_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of asset */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date the asset was acquired */,
  "valuation_date" TEXT /* Date the asset was last valued */,
  "current_value" TEXT /* Current value of the asset */,
  "valuation_method" TEXT /* Method used to value the asset */,
  "valuation_source" TEXT /* Source of the valuation data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assets_under_charge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_under_charge_asset_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_type_id") REFERENCES asset_types ("asset_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charge_holders" (
  "charge_holder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charge holder */,
  "charge_holder_name" TEXT /* Name of the charge holder */,
  "charge_holder_type" TEXT /* Type of charge holder (e.g., bank, individual) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the charge holder */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email address */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the charge holder */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the charge holder was established */,
  "legal_status" TEXT /* Legal status of the charge holder (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("charge_holder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_types" (
  "asset_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset type */,
  "asset_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charge_types" (
  "charge_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charge type */,
  "charge_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the charge type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the charge type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("charge_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charge_status" (
  "charge_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charge status */,
  "charge_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the charge status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the charge status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("charge_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charge_history" (
  "charge_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charge history entry */,
  "charge_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the charge */,
  "modification_date" TEXT /* Date of the modification */,
  "previous_amount" TEXT /* Previous amount of the charge */,
  "new_amount" TEXT /* New amount of the charge */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the modification */,
  "note" TEXT /* Note or comment about the modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("charge_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charge_history_charge_id FOREIGN KEY ("charge_id") REFERENCES charges ("charge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charge_history_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_hierarchy" (
  "asset_hierarchy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset hierarchy entry */,
  "parent_asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent asset */,
  "child_asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the child asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_hierarchy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_hierarchy_parent_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_asset_id") REFERENCES assets_under_charge ("assets_under_charge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_hierarchy_child_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_asset_id") REFERENCES assets_under_charge ("assets_under_charge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, manager, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has administrative privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user access entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "charge_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the charge */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_charge_id FOREIGN KEY ("charge_id") REFERENCES charges ("charge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "charge_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the charge */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., modification, closure) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "notification_details" TEXT /* Additional details or comments about the notification */,
  "sent_to" TEXT /* List of users or roles to whom the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_charge_id FOREIGN KEY ("charge_id") REFERENCES charges ("charge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., login, logout, update) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session identifier */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details or comments about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charge_holders_assets" (
  "charge_holder_asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charge holder asset entry */,
  "charge_holder_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the charge holder */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("charge_holder_asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charge_holders_assets_charge_holder_id FOREIGN KEY ("charge_holder_id") REFERENCES charge_holders ("charge_holder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charge_holders_assets_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets_under_charge ("assets_under_charge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charge_holders_charges" (
  "charge_holder_charge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charge holder charge entry */,
  "charge_holder_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the charge holder */,
  "charge_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the charge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("charge_holder_charge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charge_holders_charges_charge_holder_id FOREIGN KEY ("charge_holder_id") REFERENCES charge_holders ("charge_holder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charge_holders_charges_charge_id FOREIGN KEY ("charge_id") REFERENCES charges ("charge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets_charges" (
  "asset_charge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset charge entry */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset */,
  "charge_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the charge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_charge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_charges_charge_id FOREIGN KEY ("charge_id") REFERENCES charges ("charge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_charges_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets_under_charge ("assets_under_charge_id")
)
